creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is already under discussion in PR ports/31509, which awaits 
maintainer approval. 

In the future, please follow the guidelines in the Porter's Handbook, 
Chapter 14, Upgrading.  I don't think that you have contacted 
the current port maintainer, and you have definitely not followed 
the suggestion to send diffs against the existing port and not a whole 
new shell archive so the FreeBSD ports team can much more easily 
examine the changes and actually add them to the Ports collection. 

Better luck next time ;)
